category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides tools for compiling grammars into finite state transducers; official OpenGrm Thrax documentation describes a grammar compiler.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is thrax; source_facts.homepage is the official OpenFst/OpenGrm Thrax page.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official OpenGrm Thrax page; official OpenFst TWiki pages provide the Thrax quick tour and README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official OpenFst/OpenGrm pages provide project pages and release tarballs, but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it compiles grammars into finite state transducers; current_curation.tags includes cli.
